items.name_en: Balenciaga Rodeo 🖤🖤
items.name_cn:
Balenciaga Rodeo 🖤🖤
The popular Rodeo series has launched a new Nano chain bag ⛓️ Removable chain, instantly switch to a cute handbag ✌🏻 A must-have small bag for summer is here!!! Inner compartment with card slot, ultra-minimalist style 🔖 Who doesn't have their first summer cutie yet? ☺️
Model: 819429 Black/Gold
Dimensions: 16 x 9.9 x 4.5 cm

items.name_en: 🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
items.name_cn:
🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
The most iconic handbag, the Le City series, returns in 2024, reinterpreting the classic. Slightly different from the classic series, the mirror and cardholder are removed, and the strap design is more suitable for crossbody wear~ Small detail changes make the overall look lighter. The newly added macaron color series is especially suitable for spring and summer, creating a stylish collision of unruly cool looks and sweet colors, making fashion accessible.
Dimensions: 37 x 23.4 x 14.9 cm
Model: 823058 Silver nail

items.name_en: [Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock Red
items.name_cn:
[Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock Red
Neo Cagole New Motorcycle Bag 💋
Paris's new motorcycle bag reshapes the classic bag shape, injecting new soul into the 'motorcycle bag'. Made of top-tier Italian imported cracked leather, retaining the original DNA of the classic motorcycle bag with flat rivets, exquisite buckles, and tassel zippers, while adding adjustable woven straps and cute playful heart-shaped mirrors, perfectly softening the original unisex temperament 👍🏻, 🧐 Retro trend is back, the favorite of fashionistas 👄
Dimensions: 38*17*24cm

items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
[Balenciaga] New Crush Tote "Trash Bag", perfectly combining the Trash Bag shape with Crush elements. The wrinkled texture highlights the excellent touch. Soft washed denim and sheep leather ➕ paired with silver vintage hardware ➕ drawstring closure ➕ bold logo print. Compared to the 22bag, the real item is lighter, and cowhide is more wear-resistant than sheepskin. It captures the essence of the "Trash Bag" better than Chanel. It is a definitely large-capacity bucket bag where items can be easily thrown in. The drawstring design is this year's fashion trend; just pull gently to gather the opening. The chain design allows for hand carry, shoulder carry, or underarm carry, as well as crossbody tote, etc. Casual and unconstrained is the attitude this bag should have ✔️
Style No.: BG0305, Large Size: Length 39.8 x Height 45.9 x Width 13.9cm; Small Size: Length 23.8 x Height 25.9 x Width 9.9cm.

items.name_en: 『Balenciaga』
items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga』
New Arrival☀Balenciaga👉This season's heavy【Crocodile pattern black】hourglass bag, the unique arc shape is highly recognizable💗, it's eye-catching and super cool at first glance💘, the appearance presents a half-moon shape✨, with a metal B ring hanging down, the calf leather texture is also very touching and has a lot of style, daily necessities are carefully selected and versatile, this year's Balenciaga hourglass bag will definitely be a hit, elegant, exquisite, and unique, eye-catching at first glance, hard not to be noticed⚠😄, hand or crossbody looks amazing.😍 It is definitely the goddesses' favorite, of course I love it too! Can be salty or sweet, that's the effect. Capacity test: phone, wallet, powder, lipstick, power bank, keys, tissues, all fit easily, supports inspection. Size: 23-10-24cm
